description: A new bill, the Welcoming International Success Act, has been introduced in Congress to reverse recent H-1B visa restrictions. The legislation aims to undo a September 2025 proclamation that imposed tougher wage standards and fees on employers sponsoring foreign skilled workers. Supporters argue this will help businesses and institutions attract essential global talent, fostering innovation and economic growth.

title: Battle of the rolls: How Mamata vs EC over SIR has set stage for 2026 Bengal assembly elections
description: West Bengal’s Special Intensive Revision of electoral rolls has evolved from a technical checkinto a major political and constitutional confrontation ahead of the 2026 polls. With 63.7 lakh deletions and the electorate shrinking to 6.44 crore, Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee challenged the process in the Supreme Court, turning voter verification into a wider political battle with the Election Commission.

title: Sundar Pichai congratulates Team India on winning the ICC Men's T20 World Cup
description: India achieved a historic T20 World Cup victory, becoming the first nation to defend its title and win on home soil. This marks their third T20 World Cup title. Tech leaders Sundar Pichai and Satya Nadella congratulated the team on their remarkable achievement.

title: HALEU-Thorium fuel unsuitable for Indian nuclear reactors: study
description: The proponents of ANEEL, a new type of nuclear fuel, have suggested it can be dropped into existing reactors, including PHWRs, allowing them to use thorium today

title: We now know why some people had severe blood clots after COVID shots
description: For years, the mechanism behind VITT cast a shadow over adenoviral vector vaccines — a technology that has otherwise been central to global immunisation efforts. new A study has provided a clear molecular explanation by identifying a particular protein to be the trigger and defining the precise antibody features involved

title: Amazon sends complaint letter to FCC against Elon Musk's Starlink
description: Amazon's Project Kuiper has urged the FCC to reject SpaceX's proposal for a million-satellite constellation, citing a lack of essential technical and space safety details. Amazon argues the plan is speculative, would take centuries to deploy, and could monopolize orbital resources, hindering future space endeavors.
